ogTitle: Lower Wonga vs Lowesby: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Lower Wonga and Lowesby.
heading: Lower Wonga vs Lowesby — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Lower Wonga, Queensland and Lowesby, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Lower Wonga has a lower overall climate risk score (30/100) compared to Lowesby (37/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Lower Wonga or Lowesby safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Lower Wonga has a flood risk score of 29/100, while Lowesby scores 37/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Lower Wonga scores 24/100 for bushfire risk. Lowesby scores 53/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Lower Wonga or Lowesby?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Lower Wonga has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.98% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
